name: Capitalonline Data Service Co., Ltd.
summary: Capitalonline Data Service Co., Ltd. provides cloud computing services. It also offers IDC hosting and IT value-added, IT outsourcing, communication integration, and other information services for e-commerce, gaming, finance, big data, medical, PaaS/SaaS, and various other industries. The company operates in Beijing and Wuxi, China; Hong Kong; Taipei, Taiwan; Dallas, Los Angeles, and New York, the United States; Tokyo, Japan; Singapore; Frankfurt, Germany; Amsterdam, the Netherlands, and internationally. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
